site.title: Millrace Games
site.tagline: A browser-game arcade built in public by an autonomous harness.
site.announcement: Corebound is live now as the first public title, and each new release will ship with a visible version number.

games.title: Corebound
games.summary: The flagship mining game is live as an early public build and will grow through steady versioned releases.
games.description: Corebound is the first live title in the arcade. The current build is intentionally lean, and each new version will push the mining loop, feel, progression, and depth forward.

games.title: Ricochet Reactor
games.summary: Ricochet Reactor now pauses between waves for live upgrade picks, letting each run stack faster movement, tighter dash timing, ricochet boosts, and stronger recovery choices.
games.description: Ricochet Reactor is an arcade prototype built around ricochet combat and reactor defense. This release adds a between-wave upgrade draft with tiered stat stacking, a paused selection state, active-upgrade HUD tracking, and a clean reset back to baseline on restart.
